title: Grid Track And Slot Placement Parity v1
problem: Keep Fret's declarative grid contract strong enough to express source-aligned shadcn slot placement when upstream components depend on explicit non-uniform tracks, independent row/column gaps, and grid item/container alignment semantics such as `justify-items`, `self-start`, and `justify-self-end`.

repro.summary: This lane is closed: the explicit track contract, grid-item Fill-to-stretch semantics, grid item/container alignment + row/column gap surfaces, CardHeader/CardAction parity, and the Alert / AlertDialog sibling rewrites are all landed.
commands: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-grid-align-target cargo nextest run -p fret-ui -E 'test(grid_places_children_in_columns) or test(grid_explicit_tracks_place_spanning_child_in_source_aligned_lanes) or test(grid_justify_items_start_keeps_auto_sized_children_intrinsic) or test(grid_item_self_alignment_overrides_container_item_alignment)'

CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-grid-gap-target-5 cargo nextest run -p fret-ui --lib -E 'test(grid_explicit_tracks_place_spanning_child_in_source_aligned_lanes) or test(grid_justify_items_start_keeps_auto_sized_children_intrinsic) or test(grid_item_self_alignment_overrides_container_item_alignment) or test(grid_axis_specific_gaps_keep_row_and_column_spacing_independent)'

CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-alert-dialog-grid-target-5 cargo nextest run -p fret-ui-shadcn --lib -E 'test(alert_dialog_footer_stacks_on_base_viewport_and_rows_on_sm) or test(alert_dialog_media_panel_stays_compact_within_default_width) or test(alert_dialog_small_media_panel_keeps_text_and_footer_within_compact_height)'

CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-grid-align-target cargo nextest run -p fret-ui-gallery --test card_docs_surface -E 'test(card_page_documents_source_axes_and_children_api_decision) or test(card_docs_path_snippets_stay_copyable_and_docs_aligned) or test(card_docs_diag_script_covers_docs_path_and_fret_followups)'

gates.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-grid-align-target cargo nextest run -p fret-ui -E 'test(grid_places_children_in_columns) or test(grid_explicit_tracks_place_spanning_child_in_source_aligned_lanes) or test(grid_justify_items_start_keeps_auto_sized_children_intrinsic) or test(grid_item_self_alignment_overrides_container_item_alignment)'

gates.name: fret-ui-grid-axis-gap-contract
gates.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-grid-gap-target-5 cargo nextest run -p fret-ui --lib -E 'test(grid_explicit_tracks_place_spanning_child_in_source_aligned_lanes) or test(grid_justify_items_start_keeps_auto_sized_children_intrinsic) or test(grid_item_self_alignment_overrides_container_item_alignment) or test(grid_axis_specific_gaps_keep_row_and_column_spacing_independent)'

gates.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-alert-dialog-grid-target-5 cargo nextest run -p fret-ui-shadcn --lib -E 'test(alert_dialog_footer_stacks_on_base_viewport_and_rows_on_sm) or test(alert_dialog_media_panel_stays_compact_within_default_width) or test(alert_dialog_small_media_panel_keeps_text_and_footer_within_compact_height)'

gates.name: ui-gallery-card-docs-surface
gates.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fret-codex-grid-align-target cargo nextest run -p fret-ui-gallery --test card_docs_surface -E 'test(card_page_documents_source_axes_and_children_api_decision) or test(card_docs_path_snippets_stay_copyable_and_docs_aligned) or test(card_docs_diag_script_covers_docs_path_and_fret_followups)'

continue_policy.notes: Close this lane. If later parity work still drifts on `w-fit` / `self-start` / `items-stretch`, start a narrower declarative item-alignment follow-on rather than reopening the grid runtime contract.
